rent.source: numbeo.com George Town May 2026 / nomads.com Penang
rent.note: furnished 1BR in city center George Town; avg MYR 1,500-3,000 ($335-670); midpoint

groceries.note: Penang famous for hawker food; mix of wet market + Giant/Tesco

diningOut.source: nomadnumbers.com Penang cost of nomad living
diningOut.note: legendary hawker food $1-3/meal; Penang is Southeast Asia's food capital

transit.note: Grab + local bus; affordable transport options

coworking.note: growing coworking scene in George Town; ~RM 400-500/mo

misc.source: nomadnumbers.com Penang cost of nomad living
misc.note: gym, entertainment, personal care, cultural activities, buffer

accomSeasonality._doc: 12 monthly multipliers applied to RENT ONLY (Jan..Dec). 1.0 = base. Raise for peak tourist/weather months, lower for off-peak.

evidence.quote: One-bedroom apartments in the city center rent for MYR 1,500–3,000/month. Average rent prices for a one-bedroom apartment in the center of Penang cost USD $427

evidence.claim: Penang comfortable monthly MYR 3,500-6,000 including all expenses
evidence.quote: A comfortable monthly budget in Penang is MYR 3,500–6,000, which includes rent, groceries, transport, utilities, dining out, and entertainment
basic utilities for expats typically cost around 163 RM monthly for an 85-square-meter apartment, while reliable internet and mobile services range from 40-125 RM per month
a single person costs $845 per month, while a single traveler costs $1,176 per month
